title: 医院走廊生物恐怖
hints: 一个详细的 12 秒恐怖序列提示词，设定在废弃医院，包含悬疑反转和高冲击力的生物跳跃惊吓。
visualStyle:
Hospital Corridor Fake-Out (12 Seconds)

Scene / Setting

Night. Large abandoned Indian hospital corridor. Flickering fluorescent lights. Wheelchairs, rusted stretchers, peeling paint, long empty hallway. Everything clearly visible.

Camera

Medium shot from behind and beside an elderly Indian woman sitting in a wheelchair. Stable handheld smartphone footage. Slight shake.

Subject / Action

An elderly Indian woman sits alone in a wheelchair in the middle of an abandoned hospital corridor.

A nurse is pushing her.

A voice calls from off-screen:

“Sister, ek minute idhar aana!”

The nurse responds:

“Ek second.”

The nurse walks away, leaving the elderly woman alone.

The woman watches her disappear.

Silence.

At the far end of the corridor is a large cross-passage.

The woman stares toward it.

A massive shadow slowly appears on the wall.

Then an enormous creature walks across the distant opening.

Tall and inhuman.

Glossy black skin.

Long limbs.

Slightly wet, slimy appearance.

Its silhouette fills the entire cross-passage as it slowly walks from one side to the other.

The elderly woman freezes in terror.

The creature disappears from view.

Silence.

Nothing happens.

The woman exhales in relief.

Then she hears a faint sound above her.

A wet scraping noise.

She slowly looks upward.

Suddenly the same creature drops from the ceiling directly in front of her wheelchair.

Its face fills the frame.

It releases a violent screech.

The woman screams.

Hard cut to black.

Audio

Wheelchair sounds, distant hospital hum, flickering lights, wet scraping from above, final creature screech.

Style

Ultra-realistic horror, realistic creature movement, strong fake-out, fast escalation, high-impact jump scare, found-footage realism, no animation.

A young shrine maiden forms mystical hand seals as golden spiritual energy flows into the ground. A massive golden magic circle expands beneath her, ancient runes glowing while debris levitates around her.

Dark jade and golden-violet spiritual mist rises from the circle as a giant Japanese salamander spirit emerges. The girl performs sacred summoning seals while chanting:

「山椒の霊、我に従え！力を授けよ！」

The salamander spirit merges with her body. Spiritual energy races across her limbs as her school uniform transforms into a sleek shrine maiden battle outfit. Her hair becomes combat-ready twin tails, water-ripple barriers form around her, and salamander markings appear near her eyes.

A magical dagger materializes from spiritual energy. She draws the blade and enters a swift, feline combat stance. The dagger glows with golden-violet and jade energy, engraved with salamander scales and sacred runes.

The sequence ends with her spinning the dagger, creating luminous water-ripple arcs while adopting a low hunting stance. The magic circle fades as her power stabilizes, leaving a tense silence before battle.

title: 恐龙鳄鱼混合体海滩袭击
hints: 一段逼真的伪纪录片风格提示词，描述一只巨大的混合生物袭击拥挤海滩的场景，采用手持摄像机拍摄的晃动效果。
visualStyle: Realistic shaky handheld mobile phone footage, slightly compressed video quality, digital zoom, grainy phone camera look, vertical 9:16 format. Taken from the third story balcony of a beachfront building in Brazil during chaos. Massive hybrid sea creature (giant crocodile head with squid-like tentacles, dark scaly skin, huge glowing eyes) emerges from the ocean onto the crowded beach.\nSingle continuous chaotic shot. People screaming and running in panic everywhere. The creature manhandles victims — grabbing people with long powerful tentacles, lifting them high into the air and slamming them into the sand or throwing them into the ocean. Loud screaming, crashing waves, and creature roars. Hyper-realistic panic, cinematic yet authentic phone footage style, dramatic daylight with strong contrast, high detail, chaotic energy, 9:16.

title: 伪纪录片风格：鳄鱼怪兽大暴走
hints: 一个紧张刺激、多镜头切换的伪纪录片风格提示词，描述了一只巨大的鳄鱼乌贼混合怪兽在巴西海滩上横冲直撞的场景。
visualStyle:
Realistic shaky handheld mobile phone footage, vertical 9:16 format, grainy compressed phone camera look, digital zoom, authentic found footage style. Bright daylight on a crowded Brazilian beach.

Shot 1 (0-4s) – Third Floor Building POVHandheld shot from the third-floor balcony of a beachfront building. A massive hybrid sea creature (giant crocodile head with long powerful squid-like tentacles, dark scaly skin, glowing eyes) explodes out of the ocean and charges onto the crowded beach. People scream and run in absolute panic. The creature immediately starts grabbing victims with its tentacles, lifting them high and slamming them into the sand or throwing them into the sea. Shaky digital zoom in as it bites down on one person and flings the body across the beach.

Shot 2 (4-9s) – Cut to Ground Level ChaosFast cut to ground-level shaky handheld footage running on the beach. Complete pandemonium — people screaming and running in every direction. The massive creature rampages through the crowd, tentacles whipping wildly, smashing beach umbrellas and stalls. It grabs multiple people at once, throwing them into the air. The camera shakes violently as the person filming runs backward trying to escape while still recording.

Shot 3 (9-13s) – Final PayoffThe creature grabs a screaming man with one powerful tentacle, lifts him high, and violently slings him directly toward the camera. The man flies through the air and smashes hard into a coconut stall right behind the person filming. Coconuts explode everywhere. The camera shakes wildly from the impact, tilts, and catches a brief glimpse of the man lying bloody and broken among the smashed coconuts. The creature roars and charges forward as the person filming screams and tries to run. Hard cut to black on the sound of heavy footsteps and tentacles slamming into the sand.

Hyper-realistic creature design, realistic physics, chaotic energy, loud screaming, crashing waves, raw found footage style, high detail, bright daylight with strong contrast, extremely intense and fast-paced.
